input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history
# Usage: claude-search [term]   or   cs [term]
#
# Shortcuts:
#   Enter    - Resume conversation
#   Ctrl-Y   - Copy sessionId
#   Ctrl-L   - Open debug log
#   Ctrl-R   - Reload cache
#   Ctrl-/   - Toggle preview
#

set -euo pipefail

# === CONFIG ===
readonly HISTORY_FILE="${HOME}/.claude/history.jsonl"
readonly DEBUG_DIR="${HOME}/.claude/debug"
readonly CACHE_FILE="/tmp/claude-search-cache-$(id -u).tsv"
readonly CACHE_TTL=60
readonly UUID_REGEX='^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$'

# === COLORS ===
readonly C_RESET='\033[0m'
readonly C_RED='\033[31m'
readonly C_GREEN='\033[32m'
readonly C_YELLOW='\033[33m'
readonly C_CYAN='\033[36m'
readonly C_DIM='\033[2m'

# === LOGGING ===
log_error() { echo -e "${C_RED}Error:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_warn()  { echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Warning:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_info()  { echo -e "${C_GREEN}$*${C_RESET}"; }

# === VALIDATION ===

# Validate UUID format
is_valid_uuid() {
    local uuid="$1"
    [[ -n "$uuid" && "$uuid" =~ $UUID_REGEX ]]
}

# Sanitize input - remove dangerous characters
sanitize_input() {
    local input="$1"
    # Remove shell metacharacters, keep alphanumeric, spaces, dashes, dots
    echo "$input" | tr -cd '[:alnum:][:space:]._-'
}

# Check if file exists and is readable
check_file() {
    local file="$1"
    local desc="$2"

    if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not found: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -r "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not readable: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -s "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc is empty: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# Check required dependencies
check_dependencies() {
    local missing=()

    command -v fzf >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("fzf")
    command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("jq")

    if [[ ${#missing[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
        log_error "Missing dependencies: ${missing[*]}"
        echo "Install with: brew install ${missing[*]}" >&2
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# === FUNCTIONS ===

show_help() {
    cat << 'EOF'
claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history

USAGE:
    claude-search [options] [term]
    cs [term]

OPTIONS:
    -p, --project FILTER   Filter by project name
    -h, --help             Show this help
    --clear-cache          Clear cached data

FZF SHORTCUTS:
    Enter      Resume conversation in original project
    Ctrl-Y     Copy sessionId to clipboard
    Ctrl-L     Open debug log
    Ctrl-R     Reload cache
    Ctrl-/     Toggle preview

EXAMPLES:
    cs                  # interactive search
    cs "docker"         # search with initial term
    cs -p my-project    # filter by project
    cs --clear-cache    # reset cache
EOF
    exit 0
}

# Generate processed cache with validation
generate_cache() {
    # Check if cache is fresh
    if [[ -f "$CACHE_FILE" ]]; then
        local cache_age
        cache_age=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) ))
        if (( cache_age < CACHE_TTL )); then
            return 0
        fi
    fi

    # Validate history file
    if ! check_file "$HISTORY_FILE" "History file"; then
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate JSON structure (sample first line)
    if ! head -1 "$HISTORY_FILE" | jq -e '.sessionId and .timestamp and .project' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "Invalid history file format"
        return 1
    fi

    # Process history.jsonl to tabular format
    local temp_cache="${CACHE_FILE}.tmp"

    if ! jq -r '[.sessionId, .timestamp, .project, (.display | gsub("\n"; " ") | .[0:200])] | @tsv' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS=$'\t' read -r sid ts proj msg; do
        # Validate each record
        if ! is_valid_uuid "$sid"; then
            continue
        fi

        if [[ -z "$ts" || ! "$ts" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            continue
        fi

        local date_fmt
        date_fmt=$(date -r $((ts / 1000)) "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "???")

        local short_proj
        short_proj=$(echo "${proj:-unknown}" | rev | cut -d'/' -f1-2 | rev)

        printf '%s\t%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$sid" "$date_fmt" "$short_proj" "${msg:-<empty>}"
    done > "$temp_cache"; then
        log_error "Failed to process history file"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate output
    if [[ ! -s "$temp_cache" ]]; then
        log_error "No valid entries found in history"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    mv "$temp_cache" "$CACHE_FILE"
    return 0
}

# Preview handler with validation
show_preview() {
    local session_id="$1"

    # Validate sessionId
    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        echo -e "${C_RED}Invalid session ID${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_CYAN}═══ Session: ${session_id:0:8}... ═══${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # Session info with error handling
    local project msg_count
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    msg_count=$(jq --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid)' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Session not found in history${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Project:${C_RESET} ${project:-unknown}"
    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Messages:${C_RESET} ${msg_count:-0}"

    # Debug log info
    local debug_file="${DEBUG_DIR}/${session_id}.txt"
    if [[ -f "$debug_file" && -r "$debug_file" ]]; then
        local debug_size
        debug_size=$(ls -lh "$debug_file" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')
        echo -e "${C_GREEN}Debug log:${C_RESET} ${debug_size:-?} (Ctrl-L to open)"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo -e "${C_CYAN}─── Messages ───${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # List session messages
    jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" '
        select(.sessionId == $sid) | .display // "<empty>"
    ' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS= read -r msg; do
        echo -e "${C_DIM}•${C_RESET} $msg"
        echo ""
    done | fold -s -w 70
}

# Force cache regeneration
regenerate_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    if generate_cache; then
        cat "$CACHE_FILE"
    else
        exit 1
    fi
}

# Clear cache
clear_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    log_info "Cache cleared"
    exit 0
}

# === MAIN ===

main() {
    local filter_project=""
    local query=""

    # Parse arguments with validation
    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
        case "$1" in
            -p|--project)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option -p requires a project name"
                    exit 1
                fi
                filter_project=$(sanitize_input "$2")
                if [[ -z "$filter_project" ]]; then
                    log_error "Invalid project filter"
                    exit 1
                fi
                shift 2
                ;;
            -h|--help)
                show_help
                ;;
            --preview)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option --preview requires a session ID"
                    exit 1
                fi
                show_preview "$2"
                exit 0
                ;;
            --regenerate)
                regenerate_cache
                exit 0
                ;;
            --clear-cache)
                clear_cache
                ;;
            -*)
                log_error "Unknown option: $1"
                echo "Use -h for help" >&2
                exit 1
                ;;
            *)
                query=$(sanitize_input "$1")
                shift
                ;;
        esac
    done

    # Check dependencies
    if ! check_dependencies; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Generate cache
    if ! generate_cache; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Apply project filter
    local input_data
    if [[ -n "$filter_project" ]]; then
        input_data=$(grep -i "$filter_project" "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
        if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
            log_warn "No messages found for project filter: $filter_project"
            exit 0
        fi
    else
        input_data=$(cat "$CACHE_FILE")
    fi

    if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
        log_warn "No messages found in history"
        exit 0
    fi

    # Count entries
    local entry_count
    entry_count=$(echo "$input_data" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    # Run fzf
    local selected
    selected=$(echo "$input_data" | \
        fzf \
            --ansi \
            --delimiter=$'\t' \
            --with-nth=2,3,4 \
            --nth=3,4 \
            --preview="$0 --preview {1}" \
            --preview-window=right:50%:wrap \
            --header="$entry_count entries │ Enter:Resume │ Ctrl-Y:Copy │ Ctrl-L:Log │ Ctrl-R:Reload" \
            --bind='ctrl-y:execute-silent(echo -n {1} | pbcopy)+abort' \
            --bind="ctrl-l:execute(less \"${DEBUG_DIR}/{1}.txt\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Debug log not found')" \
            --bind="ctrl-r:reload($0 --regenerate)" \
            --query="$query" \
            --prompt='claude> ' \
            --height=80% \
            --layout=reverse \
            --border=rounded \
            --info=inline \
            --color='header:italic:dim' \
        || true)

    # User cancelled
    [[ -z "$selected" ]] && exit 0

    # Extract and validate selection
    local session_id
    session_id=$(echo "$selected" | cut -f1)

    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        log_error "Invalid session ID selected"
        exit 1
    fi

    local project
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        log_error "Session not found: $session_id"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo ""
    log_info "Resuming session: ${session_id:0:8}..."
    echo -e "${C_GREEN}Project:${C_RESET} $project"
    echo ""

    # Navigate to project and resume
    if [[ -d "$project" ]]; then
        cd "$project" || {
            log_warn "Failed to cd to project, using current directory"
        }
    else
        log_warn "Project directory does not exist: $project"
        echo "Using current directory instead"
    fi

    # Verify claude command exists
    if ! command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "claude command not found"
        exit 1
    fi

    exec claude --resume "$session_id"
}

main "$@"

    94→claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history

   246→# === MAIN ===

   248→main() {

   250→    local query=""
   251→
   252→    # Parse arguments with validation
   253→    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
   254→        case "$1" in

   308→    local input_data

   310→        input_data=$(grep -i "$filter_project" "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)

   312→            log_warn "No messages found for project filter: $filter_project"
   313→            exit 0
   314→        fi
   315→    else
   316→        input_data=$(cat "$CACHE_FILE")
   317→    fi
   318→
   319→    if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
   320→        log_warn "No messages found in history"

   322→    fi

   335→            --nth=3,4 \

   345→            --layout=reverse \
   346→            --border=rounded \
   347→            --info=inline \

   370→

   373→    echo -e "${C_GREEN}Project:${C_RESET} $project"
   374→    echo ""
   375→
   376→    # Navigate to project and resume
   377→    if [[ -d "$project" ]]; then
   378→        cd "$project" || {

toolUseResult.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history
# Usage: claude-search [term]   or   cs [term]
#
# Shortcuts:
#   Enter    - Resume conversation
#   Ctrl-Y   - Copy sessionId
#   Ctrl-L   - Open debug log
#   Ctrl-R   - Reload cache
#   Ctrl-/   - Toggle preview
#

set -euo pipefail

# === CONFIG ===
readonly HISTORY_FILE="${HOME}/.claude/history.jsonl"
readonly DEBUG_DIR="${HOME}/.claude/debug"
readonly CACHE_FILE="/tmp/claude-search-cache-$(id -u).tsv"
readonly CACHE_TTL=60
readonly UUID_REGEX='^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$'

# === COLORS ===
readonly C_RESET='\033[0m'
readonly C_RED='\033[31m'
readonly C_GREEN='\033[32m'
readonly C_YELLOW='\033[33m'
readonly C_CYAN='\033[36m'
readonly C_DIM='\033[2m'

# === LOGGING ===
log_error() { echo -e "${C_RED}Error:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_warn()  { echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Warning:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_info()  { echo -e "${C_GREEN}$*${C_RESET}"; }

# === VALIDATION ===

# Validate UUID format
is_valid_uuid() {
    local uuid="$1"
    [[ -n "$uuid" && "$uuid" =~ $UUID_REGEX ]]
}

# Sanitize input - remove dangerous characters
sanitize_input() {
    local input="$1"
    # Remove shell metacharacters, keep alphanumeric, spaces, dashes, dots
    echo "$input" | tr -cd '[:alnum:][:space:]._-'
}

# Check if file exists and is readable
check_file() {
    local file="$1"
    local desc="$2"

    if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not found: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -r "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not readable: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -s "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc is empty: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# Check required dependencies
check_dependencies() {
    local missing=()

    command -v fzf >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("fzf")
    command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("jq")

    if [[ ${#missing[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
        log_error "Missing dependencies: ${missing[*]}"
        echo "Install with: brew install ${missing[*]}" >&2
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# === FUNCTIONS ===

show_help() {
    cat << 'EOF'
claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history

USAGE:
    claude-search [options] [term]
    cs [term]

OPTIONS:
    -p, --project FILTER   Filter by project name
    -h, --help             Show this help
    --clear-cache          Clear cached data

FZF SHORTCUTS:
    Enter      Resume conversation in original project
    Ctrl-Y     Copy sessionId to clipboard
    Ctrl-L     Open debug log
    Ctrl-R     Reload cache
    Ctrl-/     Toggle preview

EXAMPLES:
    cs                  # interactive search
    cs "docker"         # search with initial term
    cs -p my-project    # filter by project
    cs --clear-cache    # reset cache
EOF
    exit 0
}

# Generate processed cache with validation
generate_cache() {
    # Check if cache is fresh
    if [[ -f "$CACHE_FILE" ]]; then
        local cache_age
        cache_age=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) ))
        if (( cache_age < CACHE_TTL )); then
            return 0
        fi
    fi

    # Validate history file
    if ! check_file "$HISTORY_FILE" "History file"; then
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate JSON structure (sample first line)
    if ! head -1 "$HISTORY_FILE" | jq -e '.sessionId and .timestamp and .project' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "Invalid history file format"
        return 1
    fi

    # Process history.jsonl to tabular format
    local temp_cache="${CACHE_FILE}.tmp"

    if ! jq -r '[.sessionId, .timestamp, .project, (.display | gsub("\n"; " ") | .[0:200])] | @tsv' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS=$'\t' read -r sid ts proj msg; do
        # Validate each record
        if ! is_valid_uuid "$sid"; then
            continue
        fi

        if [[ -z "$ts" || ! "$ts" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            continue
        fi

        local date_fmt
        date_fmt=$(date -r $((ts / 1000)) "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "???")

        local short_proj
        short_proj=$(echo "${proj:-unknown}" | rev | cut -d'/' -f1-2 | rev)

        printf '%s\t%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$sid" "$date_fmt" "$short_proj" "${msg:-<empty>}"
    done > "$temp_cache"; then
        log_error "Failed to process history file"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate output
    if [[ ! -s "$temp_cache" ]]; then
        log_error "No valid entries found in history"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    mv "$temp_cache" "$CACHE_FILE"
    return 0
}

# Preview handler with validation
show_preview() {
    local session_id="$1"

    # Validate sessionId
    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        echo -e "${C_RED}Invalid session ID${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_CYAN}═══ Session: ${session_id:0:8}... ═══${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # Session info with error handling
    local project msg_count
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    msg_count=$(jq --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid)' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Session not found in history${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Project:${C_RESET} ${project:-unknown}"
    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Messages:${C_RESET} ${msg_count:-0}"

    # Debug log info
    local debug_file="${DEBUG_DIR}/${session_id}.txt"
    if [[ -f "$debug_file" && -r "$debug_file" ]]; then
        local debug_size
        debug_size=$(ls -lh "$debug_file" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')
        echo -e "${C_GREEN}Debug log:${C_RESET} ${debug_size:-?} (Ctrl-L to open)"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo -e "${C_CYAN}─── Messages ───${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # List session messages
    jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" '
        select(.sessionId == $sid) | .display // "<empty>"
    ' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS= read -r msg; do
        echo -e "${C_DIM}•${C_RESET} $msg"
        echo ""
    done | fold -s -w 70
}

# Force cache regeneration
regenerate_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    if generate_cache; then
        cat "$CACHE_FILE"
    else
        exit 1
    fi
}

# Clear cache
clear_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    log_info "Cache cleared"
    exit 0
}

# === MAIN ===

main() {
    local filter_project=""
    local query=""

    # Parse arguments with validation
    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
        case "$1" in
            -p|--project)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option -p requires a project name"
                    exit 1
                fi
                filter_project=$(sanitize_input "$2")
                if [[ -z "$filter_project" ]]; then
                    log_error "Invalid project filter"
                    exit 1
                fi
                shift 2
                ;;
            -h|--help)
                show_help
                ;;
            --preview)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option --preview requires a session ID"
                    exit 1
                fi
                show_preview "$2"
                exit 0
                ;;
            --regenerate)
                regenerate_cache
                exit 0
                ;;
            --clear-cache)
                clear_cache
                ;;
            -*)
                log_error "Unknown option: $1"
                echo "Use -h for help" >&2
                exit 1
                ;;
            *)
                query=$(sanitize_input "$1")
                shift
                ;;
        esac
    done

    # Check dependencies
    if ! check_dependencies; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Generate cache
    if ! generate_cache; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Apply project filter
    local input_data
    if [[ -n "$filter_project" ]]; then
        input_data=$(grep -i "$filter_project" "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
        if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
            log_warn "No messages found for project filter: $filter_project"
            exit 0
        fi
    else
        input_data=$(cat "$CACHE_FILE")
    fi

    if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
        log_warn "No messages found in history"
        exit 0
    fi

    # Count entries
    local entry_count
    entry_count=$(echo "$input_data" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    # Run fzf
    local selected
    selected=$(echo "$input_data" | \
        fzf \
            --ansi \
            --delimiter=$'\t' \
            --with-nth=2,3,4 \
            --nth=3,4 \
            --preview="$0 --preview {1}" \
            --preview-window=right:50%:wrap \
            --header="$entry_count entries │ Enter:Resume │ Ctrl-Y:Copy │ Ctrl-L:Log │ Ctrl-R:Reload" \
            --bind='ctrl-y:execute-silent(echo -n {1} | pbcopy)+abort' \
            --bind="ctrl-l:execute(less \"${DEBUG_DIR}/{1}.txt\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Debug log not found')" \
            --bind="ctrl-r:reload($0 --regenerate)" \
            --query="$query" \
            --prompt='claude> ' \
            --height=80% \
            --layout=reverse \
            --border=rounded \
            --info=inline \
            --color='header:italic:dim' \
        || true)

    # User cancelled
    [[ -z "$selected" ]] && exit 0

    # Extract and validate selection
    local session_id
    session_id=$(echo "$selected" | cut -f1)

    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        log_error "Invalid session ID selected"
        exit 1
    fi

    local project
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        log_error "Session not found: $session_id"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo ""
    log_info "Resuming session: ${session_id:0:8}..."
    echo -e "${C_GREEN}Project:${C_RESET} $project"
    echo ""

    # Navigate to project and resume
    if [[ -d "$project" ]]; then
        cd "$project" || {
            log_warn "Failed to cd to project, using current directory"
        }
    else
        log_warn "Project directory does not exist: $project"
        echo "Using current directory instead"
    fi

    # Verify claude command exists
    if ! command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "claude command not found"
        exit 1
    fi

    exec claude --resume "$session_id"
}

main "$@"

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history
# Usage: claude-search [term]   or   cs [term]
#
# Shortcuts:
#   Enter    - Resume conversation
#   Ctrl-Y   - Copy sessionId
#   Ctrl-L   - Open debug log
#   Ctrl-R   - Reload cache
#   Ctrl-/   - Toggle preview
#

set -euo pipefail

# === CONFIG ===
HISTORY_FILE="${HOME}/.claude/history.jsonl"
DEBUG_DIR="${HOME}/.claude/debug"
CACHE_FILE="/tmp/claude-search-cache-$(id -u).tsv"
CACHE_TTL=60

# === FUNCTIONS ===

show_help() {
    cat << 'EOF'
claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history

USAGE:
    claude-search [options] [term]
    cs [term]

OPTIONS:
    -p, --project FILTER   Filter by project
    -h, --help             Show help

FZF SHORTCUTS:
    Enter      Resume conversation in original project
    Ctrl-Y     Copy sessionId to clipboard
    Ctrl-L     Open debug log
    Ctrl-R     Reload cache
    Ctrl-/     Toggle preview

EXAMPLES:
    cs                  # interactive search
    cs "docker"         # search with initial term
    cs -p my-project    # filter by project
EOF
    exit 0
}

# Generate processed cache
generate_cache() {
    if [[ -f "$CACHE_FILE" ]]; then
        local cache_age=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) ))
        if (( cache_age < CACHE_TTL )); then
            return 0
        fi
    fi

    # Process history.jsonl to tabular format
    jq -r '[.sessionId, .timestamp, .project, (.display | gsub("\n"; " ") | .[0:200])] | @tsv' "$HISTORY_FILE" | \
    while IFS=$'\t' read -r sid ts proj msg; do
        local date_fmt=$(date -r $((ts / 1000)) "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "???")
        local short_proj=$(echo "$proj" | rev | cut -d'/' -f1-2 | rev)
        printf '%s\t%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$sid" "$date_fmt" "$short_proj" "$msg"
    done > "$CACHE_FILE"
}

# Preview handler
show_preview() {
    local session_id="$1"

    echo -e "\033[36m═══ Session: ${session_id:0:8}... ═══\033[0m"
    echo ""

    # Session info
    local project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" | head -1)
    local msg_count=$(jq --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid)' "$HISTORY_FILE" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    echo -e "\033[33mProject:\033[0m $project"
    echo -e "\033[33mMessages:\033[0m $msg_count"

    # Debug log info
    local debug_file="${DEBUG_DIR}/${session_id}.txt"
    if [[ -f "$debug_file" ]]; then
        local debug_size=$(ls -lh "$debug_file" | awk '{print $5}')
        echo -e "\033[32mDebug log:\033[0m $debug_size (Ctrl-L to open)"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo -e "\033[36m─── Messages ───\033[0m"
    echo ""

    # List session messages
    jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" '
        select(.sessionId == $sid) | .display
    ' "$HISTORY_FILE" | \
    while IFS= read -r msg; do
        echo -e "\033[2m•\033[0m $msg"
        echo ""
    done | fold -s -w 70
}

# Force cache regeneration
regenerate_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    generate_cache
    cat "$CACHE_FILE"
}

# === MAIN ===

main() {
    local filter_project=""
    local query=""

    # Parse arguments
    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
        case "$1" in
            -p|--project)
                filter_project="$2"
                shift 2
                ;;
            -h|--help)
                show_help
                ;;
            --preview)
                show_preview "$2"
                exit 0
                ;;
            --regenerate)
                regenerate_cache
                exit 0
                ;;
            *)
                query="$1"
                shift
                ;;
        esac
    done

    # Check dependencies
    command -v fzf >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "Error: fzf not installed"; exit 1; }
    command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "Error: jq not installed"; exit 1; }
    [[ -f "$HISTORY_FILE" ]] || { echo "Error: History not found: $HISTORY_FILE"; exit 1; }

    # Generate cache
    generate_cache

    # Apply project filter
    local input_data
    if [[ -n "$filter_project" ]]; then
        input_data=$(grep -i "$filter_project" "$CACHE_FILE" || true)
    else
        input_data=$(cat "$CACHE_FILE")
    fi

    [[ -z "$input_data" ]] && { echo "No messages found"; exit 0; }

    # Run fzf
    local selected
    selected=$(echo "$input_data" | \
        fzf \
            --ansi \
            --delimiter=$'\t' \
            --with-nth=2,3,4 \
            --nth=3,4 \
            --preview="$0 --preview {1}" \
            --preview-window=right:50%:wrap \
            --header=$'Enter:Resume │ Ctrl-Y:Copy │ Ctrl-L:Log │ Ctrl-R:Reload │ Ctrl-/:Preview' \
            --bind='ctrl-y:execute-silent(echo -n {1} | pbcopy)+abort' \
            --bind="ctrl-l:execute(less \"${DEBUG_DIR}/{1}.txt\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Debug log not found')" \
            --bind="ctrl-r:reload($0 --regenerate)" \
            --query="$query" \
            --prompt='claude> ' \
            --height=80% \
            --layout=reverse \
            --border=rounded \
            --info=inline \
            --color='header:italic:dim' \
        || true)

    [[ -z "$selected" ]] && exit 0

    # Extract selection data
    local session_id=$(echo "$selected" | cut -f1)
    local project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" | head -1)

    echo ""
    echo -e "\033[32mResuming session:\033[0m ${session_id:0:8}..."
    echo -e "\033[32mProject:\033[0m $project"
    echo ""

    # Navigate to project and resume
    if [[ -d "$project" ]]; then
        cd "$project"
    else
        echo -e "\033[33mWarning:\033[0m Project does not exist, using current directory"
    fi

    exec claude --resume "$session_id"
}

main "$@"

O usuário testou a busca com "webgl" e notou que muitos resultados não têm relação. Isso acontece porque o fzf faz fuzzy matching por padrão, que é muito permissivo. Preciso ajustar para:

3. Pode também usar `'` prefix para match exato no fzf

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history
# Usage: claude-search [term]   or   cs [term]
#
# Shortcuts:
#   Enter    - Resume conversation
#   Ctrl-Y   - Copy sessionId
#   Ctrl-L   - Open debug log
#   Ctrl-R   - Reload cache
#   Ctrl-/   - Toggle preview
#

set -euo pipefail

# === CONFIG ===
readonly HISTORY_FILE="${HOME}/.claude/history.jsonl"
readonly DEBUG_DIR="${HOME}/.claude/debug"
readonly CACHE_FILE="/tmp/claude-search-cache-$(id -u).tsv"
readonly CACHE_TTL=60
readonly UUID_REGEX='^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$'

# === COLORS ===
readonly C_RESET='\033[0m'
readonly C_RED='\033[31m'
readonly C_GREEN='\033[32m'
readonly C_YELLOW='\033[33m'
readonly C_CYAN='\033[36m'
readonly C_DIM='\033[2m'

# === LOGGING ===
log_error() { echo -e "${C_RED}Error:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_warn()  { echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Warning:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_info()  { echo -e "${C_GREEN}$*${C_RESET}"; }

# === VALIDATION ===

# Validate UUID format
is_valid_uuid() {
    local uuid="$1"
    [[ -n "$uuid" && "$uuid" =~ $UUID_REGEX ]]
}

# Sanitize input - remove dangerous characters
sanitize_input() {
    local input="$1"
    # Remove shell metacharacters, keep alphanumeric, spaces, dashes, dots
    echo "$input" | tr -cd '[:alnum:][:space:]._-'
}

# Check if file exists and is readable
check_file() {
    local file="$1"
    local desc="$2"

    if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not found: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -r "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not readable: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -s "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc is empty: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# Check required dependencies
check_dependencies() {
    local missing=()

    command -v fzf >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("fzf")
    command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("jq")

    if [[ ${#missing[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
        log_error "Missing dependencies: ${missing[*]}"
        echo "Install with: brew install ${missing[*]}" >&2
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# === FUNCTIONS ===

show_help() {
    cat << 'EOF'
claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history

USAGE:
    claude-search [options] [term]
    cs [term]

OPTIONS:
    -p, --project FILTER   Filter by project name
    -h, --help             Show this help
    --clear-cache          Clear cached data

FZF SHORTCUTS:
    Enter      Resume conversation in original project
    Ctrl-Y     Copy sessionId to clipboard
    Ctrl-L     Open debug log
    Ctrl-R     Reload cache
    Ctrl-/     Toggle preview

EXAMPLES:
    cs                  # interactive search
    cs "docker"         # search with initial term
    cs -p my-project    # filter by project
    cs --clear-cache    # reset cache
EOF
    exit 0
}

# Generate processed cache with validation
generate_cache() {
    # Check if cache is fresh
    if [[ -f "$CACHE_FILE" ]]; then
        local cache_age
        cache_age=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) ))
        if (( cache_age < CACHE_TTL )); then
            return 0
        fi
    fi

    # Validate history file
    if ! check_file "$HISTORY_FILE" "History file"; then
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate JSON structure (sample first line)
    if ! head -1 "$HISTORY_FILE" | jq -e '.sessionId and .timestamp and .project' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "Invalid history file format"
        return 1
    fi

    # Process history.jsonl to tabular format
    local temp_cache="${CACHE_FILE}.tmp"

    if ! jq -r '[.sessionId, .timestamp, .project, (.display | gsub("\n"; " ") | .[0:200])] | @tsv' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS=$'\t' read -r sid ts proj msg; do
        # Validate each record
        if ! is_valid_uuid "$sid"; then
            continue
        fi

        if [[ -z "$ts" || ! "$ts" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            continue
        fi

        local date_fmt
        date_fmt=$(date -r $((ts / 1000)) "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "???")

        local short_proj
        short_proj=$(echo "${proj:-unknown}" | rev | cut -d'/' -f1-2 | rev)

        printf '%s\t%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$sid" "$date_fmt" "$short_proj" "${msg:-<empty>}"
    done > "$temp_cache"; then
        log_error "Failed to process history file"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate output
    if [[ ! -s "$temp_cache" ]]; then
        log_error "No valid entries found in history"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    mv "$temp_cache" "$CACHE_FILE"
    return 0
}

# Preview handler with validation
show_preview() {
    local session_id="$1"

    # Validate sessionId
    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        echo -e "${C_RED}Invalid session ID${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_CYAN}═══ Session: ${session_id:0:8}... ═══${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # Session info with error handling
    local project msg_count
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    msg_count=$(jq --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid)' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Session not found in history${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Project:${C_RESET} ${project:-unknown}"
    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Messages:${C_RESET} ${msg_count:-0}"

    # Debug log info
    local debug_file="${DEBUG_DIR}/${session_id}.txt"
    if [[ -f "$debug_file" && -r "$debug_file" ]]; then
        local debug_size
        debug_size=$(ls -lh "$debug_file" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')
        echo -e "${C_GREEN}Debug log:${C_RESET} ${debug_size:-?} (Ctrl-L to open)"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo -e "${C_CYAN}─── Messages ───${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # List session messages
    jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" '
        select(.sessionId == $sid) | .display // "<empty>"
    ' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS= read -r msg; do
        echo -e "${C_DIM}•${C_RESET} $msg"
        echo ""
    done | fold -s -w 70
}

# Force cache regeneration
regenerate_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    if generate_cache; then
        cat "$CACHE_FILE"
    else
        exit 1
    fi
}

# Clear cache
clear_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    log_info "Cache cleared"
    exit 0
}

# === MAIN ===

main() {
    local filter_project=""
    local query=""

    # Parse arguments with validation
    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
        case "$1" in
            -p|--project)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option -p requires a project name"
                    exit 1
                fi
                filter_project=$(sanitize_input "$2")
                if [[ -z "$filter_project" ]]; then
                    log_error "Invalid project filter"
                    exit 1
                fi
                shift 2
                ;;
            -h|--help)
                show_help
                ;;
            --preview)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option --preview requires a session ID"
                    exit 1
                fi
                show_preview "$2"
                exit 0
                ;;
            --regenerate)
                regenerate_cache
                exit 0
                ;;
            --clear-cache)
                clear_cache
                ;;
            -*)
                log_error "Unknown option: $1"
                echo "Use -h for help" >&2
                exit 1
                ;;
            *)
                query=$(sanitize_input "$1")
                shift
                ;;
        esac
    done

    # Check dependencies
    if ! check_dependencies; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Generate cache
    if ! generate_cache; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Apply project filter
    local input_data
    if [[ -n "$filter_project" ]]; then
        input_data=$(grep -i "$filter_project" "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
        if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
            log_warn "No messages found for project filter: $filter_project"
            exit 0
        fi
    else
        input_data=$(cat "$CACHE_FILE")
    fi

    if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
        log_warn "No messages found in history"
        exit 0
    fi

    # Count entries
    local entry_count
    entry_count=$(echo "$input_data" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    # Run fzf
    local selected
    selected=$(echo "$input_data" | \
        fzf \
            --ansi \
            --delimiter=$'\t' \
            --with-nth=2,3,4 \
            --nth=3,4 \
            --preview="$0 --preview {1}" \
            --preview-window=right:50%:wrap \
            --header="$entry_count entries │ Enter:Resume │ Ctrl-Y:Copy │ Ctrl-L:Log │ Ctrl-R:Reload" \
            --bind='ctrl-y:execute-silent(echo -n {1} | pbcopy)+abort' \
            --bind="ctrl-l:execute(less \"${DEBUG_DIR}/{1}.txt\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Debug log not found')" \
            --bind="ctrl-r:reload($0 --regenerate)" \
            --query="$query" \
            --prompt='claude> ' \
            --height=80% \
            --layout=reverse \
            --border=rounded \
            --info=inline \
            --color='header:italic:dim' \
        || true)

    # User cancelled
    [[ -z "$selected" ]] && exit 0

    # Extract and validate selection
    local session_id
    session_id=$(echo "$selected" | cut -f1)

    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        log_error "Invalid session ID selected"
        exit 1
    fi

    local project
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        log_error "Session not found: $session_id"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo ""
    log_info "Resuming session: ${session_id:0:8}..."
    echo -e "${C_GREEN}Project:${C_RESET} $project"
    echo ""

    # Navigate to project and resume
    if [[ -d "$project" ]]; then
        cd "$project" || {
            log_warn "Failed to cd to project, using current directory"
        }
    else
        log_warn "Project directory does not exist: $project"
        echo "Using current directory instead"
    fi

    # Verify claude command exists
    if ! command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "claude command not found"
        exit 1
    fi

    exec claude --resume "$session_id"
}

main "$@"

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history
# Usage: claude-search [term]   or   cs [term]
#
# Shortcuts:
#   Enter    - Resume conversation
#   Ctrl-Y   - Copy sessionId
#   Ctrl-L   - Open debug log
#   Ctrl-R   - Reload cache
#   Ctrl-/   - Toggle preview
#

set -euo pipefail

# === CONFIG ===
readonly HISTORY_FILE="${HOME}/.claude/history.jsonl"
readonly DEBUG_DIR="${HOME}/.claude/debug"
readonly CACHE_FILE="/tmp/claude-search-cache-$(id -u).tsv"
readonly CACHE_TTL=60
readonly UUID_REGEX='^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$'

# === COLORS ===
readonly C_RESET='\033[0m'
readonly C_RED='\033[31m'
readonly C_GREEN='\033[32m'
readonly C_YELLOW='\033[33m'
readonly C_CYAN='\033[36m'
readonly C_DIM='\033[2m'

# === LOGGING ===
log_error() { echo -e "${C_RED}Error:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_warn()  { echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Warning:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_info()  { echo -e "${C_GREEN}$*${C_RESET}"; }

# === VALIDATION ===

# Validate UUID format
is_valid_uuid() {
    local uuid="$1"
    [[ -n "$uuid" && "$uuid" =~ $UUID_REGEX ]]
}

# Sanitize input - remove dangerous characters
sanitize_input() {
    local input="$1"
    # Remove shell metacharacters, keep alphanumeric, spaces, dashes, dots
    echo "$input" | tr -cd '[:alnum:][:space:]._-'
}

# Check if file exists and is readable
check_file() {
    local file="$1"
    local desc="$2"

    if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not found: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -r "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not readable: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -s "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc is empty: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# Check required dependencies
check_dependencies() {
    local missing=()

    command -v fzf >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("fzf")
    command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("jq")

    if [[ ${#missing[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
        log_error "Missing dependencies: ${missing[*]}"
        echo "Install with: brew install ${missing[*]}" >&2
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# === FUNCTIONS ===

show_help() {
    cat << 'EOF'
claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history

USAGE:
    claude-search [options] [term]
    cs [term]

OPTIONS:
    -p, --project FILTER   Filter by project name
    -f, --fuzzy            Use fuzzy search (default: exact)
    -h, --help             Show this help
    --clear-cache          Clear cached data

FZF SHORTCUTS:
    Enter      Resume conversation in original project
    Ctrl-Y     Copy sessionId to clipboard
    Ctrl-L     Open debug log
    Ctrl-R     Reload cache
    Ctrl-F     Toggle fuzzy/exact mode
    Ctrl-/     Toggle preview

SEARCH TIPS:
    webgl      Exact match for "webgl"
    'webgl     Force exact match (prefix with ')
    ^webgl     Starts with "webgl"
    webgl$     Ends with "webgl"
    !webgl     Does NOT contain "webgl"

EXAMPLES:
    cs                  # interactive search
    cs "docker"         # exact search for "docker"
    cs -f "dock"        # fuzzy search for "dock"
    cs -p my-project    # filter by project
    cs --clear-cache    # reset cache
EOF
    exit 0
}

# Generate processed cache with validation
generate_cache() {
    # Check if cache is fresh
    if [[ -f "$CACHE_FILE" ]]; then
        local cache_age
        cache_age=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) ))
        if (( cache_age < CACHE_TTL )); then
            return 0
        fi
    fi

    # Validate history file
    if ! check_file "$HISTORY_FILE" "History file"; then
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate JSON structure (sample first line)
    if ! head -1 "$HISTORY_FILE" | jq -e '.sessionId and .timestamp and .project' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "Invalid history file format"
        return 1
    fi

    # Process history.jsonl to tabular format
    local temp_cache="${CACHE_FILE}.tmp"

    if ! jq -r '[.sessionId, .timestamp, .project, (.display | gsub("\n"; " ") | .[0:200])] | @tsv' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS=$'\t' read -r sid ts proj msg; do
        # Validate each record
        if ! is_valid_uuid "$sid"; then
            continue
        fi

        if [[ -z "$ts" || ! "$ts" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            continue
        fi

        local date_fmt
        date_fmt=$(date -r $((ts / 1000)) "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "???")

        local short_proj
        short_proj=$(echo "${proj:-unknown}" | rev | cut -d'/' -f1-2 | rev)

        printf '%s\t%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$sid" "$date_fmt" "$short_proj" "${msg:-<empty>}"
    done > "$temp_cache"; then
        log_error "Failed to process history file"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate output
    if [[ ! -s "$temp_cache" ]]; then
        log_error "No valid entries found in history"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    mv "$temp_cache" "$CACHE_FILE"
    return 0
}

# Preview handler with validation
show_preview() {
    local session_id="$1"

    # Validate sessionId
    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        echo -e "${C_RED}Invalid session ID${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_CYAN}═══ Session: ${session_id:0:8}... ═══${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # Session info with error handling
    local project msg_count
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    msg_count=$(jq --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid)' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Session not found in history${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Project:${C_RESET} ${project:-unknown}"
    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Messages:${C_RESET} ${msg_count:-0}"

    # Debug log info
    local debug_file="${DEBUG_DIR}/${session_id}.txt"
    if [[ -f "$debug_file" && -r "$debug_file" ]]; then
        local debug_size
        debug_size=$(ls -lh "$debug_file" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')
        echo -e "${C_GREEN}Debug log:${C_RESET} ${debug_size:-?} (Ctrl-L to open)"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo -e "${C_CYAN}─── Messages ───${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # List session messages
    jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" '
        select(.sessionId == $sid) | .display // "<empty>"
    ' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS= read -r msg; do
        echo -e "${C_DIM}•${C_RESET} $msg"
        echo ""
    done | fold -s -w 70
}

# Force cache regeneration
regenerate_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    if generate_cache; then
        cat "$CACHE_FILE"
    else
        exit 1
    fi
}

# Clear cache
clear_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    log_info "Cache cleared"
    exit 0
}

# === MAIN ===

main() {
    local filter_project=""
    local query=""

    # Parse arguments with validation
    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
        case "$1" in
            -p|--project)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option -p requires a project name"
                    exit 1
                fi
                filter_project=$(sanitize_input "$2")
                if [[ -z "$filter_project" ]]; then
                    log_error "Invalid project filter"
                    exit 1
                fi
                shift 2
                ;;
            -h|--help)
                show_help
                ;;
            --preview)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option --preview requires a session ID"
                    exit 1
                fi
                show_preview "$2"
                exit 0
                ;;
            --regenerate)
                regenerate_cache
                exit 0
                ;;
            --clear-cache)
                clear_cache
                ;;
            -*)
                log_error "Unknown option: $1"
                echo "Use -h for help" >&2
                exit 1
                ;;
            *)
                query=$(sanitize_input "$1")
                shift
                ;;
        esac
    done

    # Check dependencies
    if ! check_dependencies; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Generate cache
    if ! generate_cache; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Apply project filter
    local input_data
    if [[ -n "$filter_project" ]]; then
        input_data=$(grep -i "$filter_project" "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
        if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
            log_warn "No messages found for project filter: $filter_project"
            exit 0
        fi
    else
        input_data=$(cat "$CACHE_FILE")
    fi

    if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
        log_warn "No messages found in history"
        exit 0
    fi

    # Count entries
    local entry_count
    entry_count=$(echo "$input_data" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    # Run fzf
    local selected
    selected=$(echo "$input_data" | \
        fzf \
            --ansi \
            --delimiter=$'\t' \
            --with-nth=2,3,4 \
            --nth=3,4 \
            --preview="$0 --preview {1}" \
            --preview-window=right:50%:wrap \
            --header="$entry_count entries │ Enter:Resume │ Ctrl-Y:Copy │ Ctrl-L:Log │ Ctrl-R:Reload" \
            --bind='ctrl-y:execute-silent(echo -n {1} | pbcopy)+abort' \
            --bind="ctrl-l:execute(less \"${DEBUG_DIR}/{1}.txt\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Debug log not found')" \
            --bind="ctrl-r:reload($0 --regenerate)" \
            --query="$query" \
            --prompt='claude> ' \
            --height=80% \
            --layout=reverse \
            --border=rounded \
            --info=inline \
            --color='header:italic:dim' \
        || true)

    # User cancelled
    [[ -z "$selected" ]] && exit 0

    # Extract and validate selection
    local session_id
    session_id=$(echo "$selected" | cut -f1)

    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        log_error "Invalid session ID selected"
        exit 1
    fi

    local project
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        log_error "Session not found: $session_id"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo ""
    log_info "Resuming session: ${session_id:0:8}..."
    echo -e "${C_GREEN}Project:${C_RESET} $project"
    echo ""

    # Navigate to project and resume
    if [[ -d "$project" ]]; then
        cd "$project" || {
            log_warn "Failed to cd to project, using current directory"
        }
    else
        log_warn "Project directory does not exist: $project"
        echo "Using current directory instead"
    fi

    # Verify claude command exists
    if ! command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "claude command not found"
        exit 1
    fi

    exec claude --resume "$session_id"
}

main "$@"

        --with-nth=2,3,4
        --nth=3,4
        --preview="$0 --preview {1}"
        --preview-window=right:50%:wrap
        --bind='ctrl-y:execute-silent(echo -n {1} | pbcopy)+abort'
        --bind="ctrl-l:execute(less \"${DEBUG_DIR}/{1}.txt\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Debug log not found')"
        --bind="ctrl-r:reload($0 --regenerate)"
        --bind='ctrl-f:toggle-search'
        --query="$query"
        --prompt='claude> '
        --height=80%
        --layout=reverse
        --border=rounded
        --info=inline
        --color='header:italic:dim'
    )

    # Default to exact mode unless -f flag is passed
    local search_mode="EXACT"
    if [[ "$fuzzy_mode" == false ]]; then
        fzf_opts+=(--exact)
    else
        search_mode="FUZZY"
    fi

    fzf_opts+=(--header="$entry_count entries [$search_mode] │ Enter:Resume │ Ctrl-Y:Copy │ Ctrl-L:Log │ Ctrl-F:Toggle")

    # Run fzf
    local selected
    selected=$(echo "$input_data" | fzf "${fzf_opts[@]}" || true)
toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history
# Usage: claude-search [term]   or   cs [term]
#
# Shortcuts:
#   Enter    - Resume conversation
#   Ctrl-Y   - Copy sessionId
#   Ctrl-L   - Open debug log
#   Ctrl-R   - Reload cache
#   Ctrl-/   - Toggle preview
#

set -euo pipefail

# === CONFIG ===
readonly HISTORY_FILE="${HOME}/.claude/history.jsonl"
readonly DEBUG_DIR="${HOME}/.claude/debug"
readonly CACHE_FILE="/tmp/claude-search-cache-$(id -u).tsv"
readonly CACHE_TTL=60
readonly UUID_REGEX='^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$'

# === COLORS ===
readonly C_RESET='\033[0m'
readonly C_RED='\033[31m'
readonly C_GREEN='\033[32m'
readonly C_YELLOW='\033[33m'
readonly C_CYAN='\033[36m'
readonly C_DIM='\033[2m'

# === LOGGING ===
log_error() { echo -e "${C_RED}Error:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_warn()  { echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Warning:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_info()  { echo -e "${C_GREEN}$*${C_RESET}"; }

# === VALIDATION ===

# Validate UUID format
is_valid_uuid() {
    local uuid="$1"
    [[ -n "$uuid" && "$uuid" =~ $UUID_REGEX ]]
}

# Sanitize input - remove dangerous characters
sanitize_input() {
    local input="$1"
    # Remove shell metacharacters, keep alphanumeric, spaces, dashes, dots
    echo "$input" | tr -cd '[:alnum:][:space:]._-'
}

# Check if file exists and is readable
check_file() {
    local file="$1"
    local desc="$2"

    if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not found: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -r "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not readable: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -s "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc is empty: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# Check required dependencies
check_dependencies() {
    local missing=()

    command -v fzf >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("fzf")
    command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("jq")

    if [[ ${#missing[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
        log_error "Missing dependencies: ${missing[*]}"
        echo "Install with: brew install ${missing[*]}" >&2
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# === FUNCTIONS ===

show_help() {
    cat << 'EOF'
claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history

USAGE:
    claude-search [options] [term]
    cs [term]

OPTIONS:
    -p, --project FILTER   Filter by project name
    -f, --fuzzy            Use fuzzy search (default: exact)
    -h, --help             Show this help
    --clear-cache          Clear cached data

FZF SHORTCUTS:
    Enter      Resume conversation in original project
    Ctrl-Y     Copy sessionId to clipboard
    Ctrl-L     Open debug log
    Ctrl-R     Reload cache
    Ctrl-F     Toggle fuzzy/exact mode
    Ctrl-/     Toggle preview

SEARCH TIPS:
    webgl      Exact match for "webgl"
    'webgl     Force exact match (prefix with ')
    ^webgl     Starts with "webgl"
    webgl$     Ends with "webgl"
    !webgl     Does NOT contain "webgl"

EXAMPLES:
    cs                  # interactive search
    cs "docker"         # exact search for "docker"
    cs -f "dock"        # fuzzy search for "dock"
    cs -p my-project    # filter by project
    cs --clear-cache    # reset cache
EOF
    exit 0
}

# Generate processed cache with validation
generate_cache() {
    # Check if cache is fresh
    if [[ -f "$CACHE_FILE" ]]; then
        local cache_age
        cache_age=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) ))
        if (( cache_age < CACHE_TTL )); then
            return 0
        fi
    fi

    # Validate history file
    if ! check_file "$HISTORY_FILE" "History file"; then
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate JSON structure (sample first line)
    if ! head -1 "$HISTORY_FILE" | jq -e '.sessionId and .timestamp and .project' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "Invalid history file format"
        return 1
    fi

    # Process history.jsonl to tabular format
    local temp_cache="${CACHE_FILE}.tmp"

    if ! jq -r '[.sessionId, .timestamp, .project, (.display | gsub("\n"; " ") | .[0:200])] | @tsv' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS=$'\t' read -r sid ts proj msg; do
        # Validate each record
        if ! is_valid_uuid "$sid"; then
            continue
        fi

        if [[ -z "$ts" || ! "$ts" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            continue
        fi

        local date_fmt
        date_fmt=$(date -r $((ts / 1000)) "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "???")

        local short_proj
        short_proj=$(echo "${proj:-unknown}" | rev | cut -d'/' -f1-2 | rev)

        printf '%s\t%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$sid" "$date_fmt" "$short_proj" "${msg:-<empty>}"
    done > "$temp_cache"; then
        log_error "Failed to process history file"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate output
    if [[ ! -s "$temp_cache" ]]; then
        log_error "No valid entries found in history"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    mv "$temp_cache" "$CACHE_FILE"
    return 0
}

# Preview handler with validation
show_preview() {
    local session_id="$1"

    # Validate sessionId
    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        echo -e "${C_RED}Invalid session ID${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_CYAN}═══ Session: ${session_id:0:8}... ═══${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # Session info with error handling
    local project msg_count
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    msg_count=$(jq --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid)' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Session not found in history${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Project:${C_RESET} ${project:-unknown}"
    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Messages:${C_RESET} ${msg_count:-0}"

    # Debug log info
    local debug_file="${DEBUG_DIR}/${session_id}.txt"
    if [[ -f "$debug_file" && -r "$debug_file" ]]; then
        local debug_size
        debug_size=$(ls -lh "$debug_file" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')
        echo -e "${C_GREEN}Debug log:${C_RESET} ${debug_size:-?} (Ctrl-L to open)"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo -e "${C_CYAN}─── Messages ───${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # List session messages
    jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" '
        select(.sessionId == $sid) | .display // "<empty>"
    ' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS= read -r msg; do
        echo -e "${C_DIM}•${C_RESET} $msg"
        echo ""
    done | fold -s -w 70
}

# Force cache regeneration
regenerate_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    if generate_cache; then
        cat "$CACHE_FILE"
    else
        exit 1
    fi
}

# Clear cache
clear_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    log_info "Cache cleared"
    exit 0
}

# === MAIN ===

main() {
    local filter_project=""
    local query=""
    local fuzzy_mode=false

    # Parse arguments with validation
    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
        case "$1" in
            -f|--fuzzy)
                fuzzy_mode=true
                shift
                ;;
            -p|--project)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option -p requires a project name"
                    exit 1
                fi
                filter_project=$(sanitize_input "$2")
                if [[ -z "$filter_project" ]]; then
                    log_error "Invalid project filter"
                    exit 1
                fi
                shift 2
                ;;
            -h|--help)
                show_help
                ;;
            --preview)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option --preview requires a session ID"
                    exit 1
                fi
                show_preview "$2"
                exit 0
                ;;
            --regenerate)
                regenerate_cache
                exit 0
                ;;
            --clear-cache)
                clear_cache
                ;;
            -*)
                log_error "Unknown option: $1"
                echo "Use -h for help" >&2
                exit 1
                ;;
            *)
                query=$(sanitize_input "$1")
                shift
                ;;
        esac
    done

    # Check dependencies
    if ! check_dependencies; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Generate cache
    if ! generate_cache; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Apply project filter
    local input_data
    if [[ -n "$filter_project" ]]; then
        input_data=$(grep -i "$filter_project" "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
        if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
            log_warn "No messages found for project filter: $filter_project"
            exit 0
        fi
    else
        input_data=$(cat "$CACHE_FILE")
    fi

    if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
        log_warn "No messages found in history"
        exit 0
    fi

    # Count entries
    local entry_count
    entry_count=$(echo "$input_data" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    # Run fzf
    local selected
    selected=$(echo "$input_data" | \
        fzf \
            --ansi \
            --delimiter=$'\t' \
            --with-nth=2,3,4 \
            --nth=3,4 \
            --preview="$0 --preview {1}" \
            --preview-window=right:50%:wrap \
            --header="$entry_count entries │ Enter:Resume │ Ctrl-Y:Copy │ Ctrl-L:Log │ Ctrl-R:Reload" \
            --bind='ctrl-y:execute-silent(echo -n {1} | pbcopy)+abort' \
            --bind="ctrl-l:execute(less \"${DEBUG_DIR}/{1}.txt\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Debug log not found')" \
            --bind="ctrl-r:reload($0 --regenerate)" \
            --query="$query" \
            --prompt='claude> ' \
            --height=80% \
            --layout=reverse \
            --border=rounded \
            --info=inline \
            --color='header:italic:dim' \
        || true)

    # User cancelled
    [[ -z "$selected" ]] && exit 0

    # Extract and validate selection
    local session_id
    session_id=$(echo "$selected" | cut -f1)

    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        log_error "Invalid session ID selected"
        exit 1
    fi

    local project
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        log_error "Session not found: $session_id"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo ""
    log_info "Resuming session: ${session_id:0:8}..."
    echo -e "${C_GREEN}Project:${C_RESET} $project"
    echo ""

    # Navigate to project and resume
    if [[ -d "$project" ]]; then
        cd "$project" || {
            log_warn "Failed to cd to project, using current directory"
        }
    else
        log_warn "Project directory does not exist: $project"
        echo "Using current directory instead"
    fi

    # Verify claude command exists
    if ! command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "claude command not found"
        exit 1
    fi

    exec claude --resume "$session_id"
}

main "$@"

content.text:
Ajustado! Agora:

| Modo | Comportamento |
|------|---------------|
| **Padrão** | Busca exata (`--exact`) |
| `-f` ou `--fuzzy` | Busca fuzzy |
| `Ctrl-F` | Toggle entre modos |

**Teste novamente:**

```bash
cs webgl        # agora só mostra resultados com "webgl" exato
cs -f webgl     # fuzzy (comportamento antigo)
```

**Prefixos úteis no fzf:**

| Prefixo | Exemplo | Significado |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| `'` | `'webgl` | Match exato forçado |
| `^` | `^config` | Começa com |
| `$` | `error$` | Termina com |
| `!` | `!test` | NÃO contém |
| espaço | `docker api` | Contém ambos (AND) |
Quando a busca demora não há feedback, pode ir exibindo desde o inicio os dados e ir carregando aos poucos, com indicativo com uma barra dfe loading?

content.thinking:
O usuário quer que o script mostre feedback durante o carregamento, especialmente quando demora. Isso acontece porque o script processa todo o history.jsonl antes de mostrar o fzf.

Posso melhorar isso de várias formas:
1. Usar streaming - mostrar dados conforme são processados
2. Mostrar spinner/loading indicator enquanto processa
3. Usar --reload no fzf para carregar incrementalmente

A melhor abordagem seria:
1. Mostrar o fzf imediatamente com dados do cache (se existir)
2. Se não houver cache, mostrar um indicador de loading
3. Usar process substitution para streaming

Vou refatorar para:
1. Mostrar spinner durante geração do cache
2. Usar streaming para processar e exibir simultaneamente

input.new_string:
# === LOGGING ===
log_error() { echo -e "${C_RED}Error:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_warn()  { echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Warning:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_info()  { echo -e "${C_GREEN}$*${C_RESET}"; }

# === PROGRESS INDICATOR ===
SPINNER_CHARS='⠋⠙⠹⠸⠼⠴⠦⠧⠇⠏'
SPINNER_PID=""

start_spinner() {
    local msg="${1:-Loading...}"
    (
        local i=0
        while true; do
            printf '\r%s %s ' "${SPINNER_CHARS:i++%${#SPINNER_CHARS}:1}" "$msg" >&2
            sleep 0.1
        done
    ) &
    SPINNER_PID=$!
    disown $SPINNER_PID 2>/dev/null
}

stop_spinner() {
    if [[ -n "$SPINNER_PID" ]]; then
        kill "$SPINNER_PID" 2>/dev/null
        wait "$SPINNER_PID" 2>/dev/null
        printf '\r\033[K' >&2
        SPINNER_PID=""
    fi
}

# Cleanup on exit
trap 'stop_spinner' EXIT INT TERM

toolUseResult.newString:
# === LOGGING ===
log_error() { echo -e "${C_RED}Error:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_warn()  { echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Warning:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_info()  { echo -e "${C_GREEN}$*${C_RESET}"; }

# === PROGRESS INDICATOR ===
SPINNER_CHARS='⠋⠙⠹⠸⠼⠴⠦⠧⠇⠏'
SPINNER_PID=""

start_spinner() {
    local msg="${1:-Loading...}"
    (
        local i=0
        while true; do
            printf '\r%s %s ' "${SPINNER_CHARS:i++%${#SPINNER_CHARS}:1}" "$msg" >&2
            sleep 0.1
        done
    ) &
    SPINNER_PID=$!
    disown $SPINNER_PID 2>/dev/null
}

stop_spinner() {
    if [[ -n "$SPINNER_PID" ]]; then
        kill "$SPINNER_PID" 2>/dev/null
        wait "$SPINNER_PID" 2>/dev/null
        printf '\r\033[K' >&2
        SPINNER_PID=""
    fi
}

# Cleanup on exit
trap 'stop_spinner' EXIT INT TERM
toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history
# Usage: claude-search [term]   or   cs [term]
#
# Shortcuts:
#   Enter    - Resume conversation
#   Ctrl-Y   - Copy sessionId
#   Ctrl-L   - Open debug log
#   Ctrl-R   - Reload cache
#   Ctrl-/   - Toggle preview
#

set -euo pipefail

# === CONFIG ===
readonly HISTORY_FILE="${HOME}/.claude/history.jsonl"
readonly DEBUG_DIR="${HOME}/.claude/debug"
readonly CACHE_FILE="/tmp/claude-search-cache-$(id -u).tsv"
readonly CACHE_TTL=60
readonly UUID_REGEX='^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$'

# === COLORS ===
readonly C_RESET='\033[0m'
readonly C_RED='\033[31m'
readonly C_GREEN='\033[32m'
readonly C_YELLOW='\033[33m'
readonly C_CYAN='\033[36m'
readonly C_DIM='\033[2m'

# === LOGGING ===
log_error() { echo -e "${C_RED}Error:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_warn()  { echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Warning:${C_RESET} $*" >&2; }
log_info()  { echo -e "${C_GREEN}$*${C_RESET}"; }

# === VALIDATION ===

# Validate UUID format
is_valid_uuid() {
    local uuid="$1"
    [[ -n "$uuid" && "$uuid" =~ $UUID_REGEX ]]
}

# Sanitize input - remove dangerous characters
sanitize_input() {
    local input="$1"
    # Remove shell metacharacters, keep alphanumeric, spaces, dashes, dots
    echo "$input" | tr -cd '[:alnum:][:space:]._-'
}

# Check if file exists and is readable
check_file() {
    local file="$1"
    local desc="$2"

    if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not found: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -r "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc not readable: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -s "$file" ]]; then
        log_error "$desc is empty: $file"
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# Check required dependencies
check_dependencies() {
    local missing=()

    command -v fzf >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("fzf")
    command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing+=("jq")

    if [[ ${#missing[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
        log_error "Missing dependencies: ${missing[*]}"
        echo "Install with: brew install ${missing[*]}" >&2
        return 1
    fi

    return 0
}

# === FUNCTIONS ===

show_help() {
    cat << 'EOF'
claude-search - Interactive search in Claude Code history

USAGE:
    claude-search [options] [term]
    cs [term]

OPTIONS:
    -p, --project FILTER   Filter by project name
    -f, --fuzzy            Use fuzzy search (default: exact)
    -h, --help             Show this help
    --clear-cache          Clear cached data

FZF SHORTCUTS:
    Enter      Resume conversation in original project
    Ctrl-Y     Copy sessionId to clipboard
    Ctrl-L     Open debug log
    Ctrl-R     Reload cache
    Ctrl-F     Toggle fuzzy/exact mode
    Ctrl-/     Toggle preview

SEARCH TIPS:
    webgl      Exact match for "webgl"
    'webgl     Force exact match (prefix with ')
    ^webgl     Starts with "webgl"
    webgl$     Ends with "webgl"
    !webgl     Does NOT contain "webgl"

EXAMPLES:
    cs                  # interactive search
    cs "docker"         # exact search for "docker"
    cs -f "dock"        # fuzzy search for "dock"
    cs -p my-project    # filter by project
    cs --clear-cache    # reset cache
EOF
    exit 0
}

# Generate processed cache with validation
generate_cache() {
    # Check if cache is fresh
    if [[ -f "$CACHE_FILE" ]]; then
        local cache_age
        cache_age=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) ))
        if (( cache_age < CACHE_TTL )); then
            return 0
        fi
    fi

    # Validate history file
    if ! check_file "$HISTORY_FILE" "History file"; then
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate JSON structure (sample first line)
    if ! head -1 "$HISTORY_FILE" | jq -e '.sessionId and .timestamp and .project' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "Invalid history file format"
        return 1
    fi

    # Process history.jsonl to tabular format
    local temp_cache="${CACHE_FILE}.tmp"

    if ! jq -r '[.sessionId, .timestamp, .project, (.display | gsub("\n"; " ") | .[0:200])] | @tsv' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS=$'\t' read -r sid ts proj msg; do
        # Validate each record
        if ! is_valid_uuid "$sid"; then
            continue
        fi

        if [[ -z "$ts" || ! "$ts" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            continue
        fi

        local date_fmt
        date_fmt=$(date -r $((ts / 1000)) "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "???")

        local short_proj
        short_proj=$(echo "${proj:-unknown}" | rev | cut -d'/' -f1-2 | rev)

        printf '%s\t%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$sid" "$date_fmt" "$short_proj" "${msg:-<empty>}"
    done > "$temp_cache"; then
        log_error "Failed to process history file"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate output
    if [[ ! -s "$temp_cache" ]]; then
        log_error "No valid entries found in history"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    mv "$temp_cache" "$CACHE_FILE"
    return 0
}

# Preview handler with validation
show_preview() {
    local session_id="$1"

    # Validate sessionId
    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        echo -e "${C_RED}Invalid session ID${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_CYAN}═══ Session: ${session_id:0:8}... ═══${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # Session info with error handling
    local project msg_count
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    msg_count=$(jq --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid)' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Session not found in history${C_RESET}"
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Project:${C_RESET} ${project:-unknown}"
    echo -e "${C_YELLOW}Messages:${C_RESET} ${msg_count:-0}"

    # Debug log info
    local debug_file="${DEBUG_DIR}/${session_id}.txt"
    if [[ -f "$debug_file" && -r "$debug_file" ]]; then
        local debug_size
        debug_size=$(ls -lh "$debug_file" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')
        echo -e "${C_GREEN}Debug log:${C_RESET} ${debug_size:-?} (Ctrl-L to open)"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo -e "${C_CYAN}─── Messages ───${C_RESET}"
    echo ""

    # List session messages
    jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" '
        select(.sessionId == $sid) | .display // "<empty>"
    ' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS= read -r msg; do
        echo -e "${C_DIM}•${C_RESET} $msg"
        echo ""
    done | fold -s -w 70
}

# Force cache regeneration
regenerate_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    if generate_cache; then
        cat "$CACHE_FILE"
    else
        exit 1
    fi
}

# Clear cache
clear_cache() {
    rm -f "$CACHE_FILE"
    log_info "Cache cleared"
    exit 0
}

# === MAIN ===

main() {
    local filter_project=""
    local query=""
    local fuzzy_mode=false

    # Parse arguments with validation
    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
        case "$1" in
            -f|--fuzzy)
                fuzzy_mode=true
                shift
                ;;
            -p|--project)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option -p requires a project name"
                    exit 1
                fi
                filter_project=$(sanitize_input "$2")
                if [[ -z "$filter_project" ]]; then
                    log_error "Invalid project filter"
                    exit 1
                fi
                shift 2
                ;;
            -h|--help)
                show_help
                ;;
            --preview)
                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]]; then
                    log_error "Option --preview requires a session ID"
                    exit 1
                fi
                show_preview "$2"
                exit 0
                ;;
            --regenerate)
                regenerate_cache
                exit 0
                ;;
            --clear-cache)
                clear_cache
                ;;
            -*)
                log_error "Unknown option: $1"
                echo "Use -h for help" >&2
                exit 1
                ;;
            *)
                query=$(sanitize_input "$1")
                shift
                ;;
        esac
    done

    # Check dependencies
    if ! check_dependencies; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Generate cache
    if ! generate_cache; then
        exit 1
    fi

    # Apply project filter
    local input_data
    if [[ -n "$filter_project" ]]; then
        input_data=$(grep -i "$filter_project" "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
        if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
            log_warn "No messages found for project filter: $filter_project"
            exit 0
        fi
    else
        input_data=$(cat "$CACHE_FILE")
    fi

    if [[ -z "$input_data" ]]; then
        log_warn "No messages found in history"
        exit 0
    fi

    # Count entries
    local entry_count
    entry_count=$(echo "$input_data" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

    # Build fzf options
    local fzf_opts=(
        --ansi
        --delimiter=$'\t'
        --with-nth=2,3,4
        --nth=3,4
        --preview="$0 --preview {1}"
        --preview-window=right:50%:wrap
        --bind='ctrl-y:execute-silent(echo -n {1} | pbcopy)+abort'
        --bind="ctrl-l:execute(less \"${DEBUG_DIR}/{1}.txt\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Debug log not found')"
        --bind="ctrl-r:reload($0 --regenerate)"
        --bind='ctrl-f:toggle-search'
        --query="$query"
        --prompt='claude> '
        --height=80%
        --layout=reverse
        --border=rounded
        --info=inline
        --color='header:italic:dim'
    )

    # Default to exact mode unless -f flag is passed
    local search_mode="EXACT"
    if [[ "$fuzzy_mode" == false ]]; then
        fzf_opts+=(--exact)
    else
        search_mode="FUZZY"
    fi

    fzf_opts+=(--header="$entry_count entries [$search_mode] │ Enter:Resume │ Ctrl-Y:Copy │ Ctrl-L:Log │ Ctrl-F:Toggle")

    # Run fzf
    local selected
    selected=$(echo "$input_data" | fzf "${fzf_opts[@]}" || true)

    # User cancelled
    [[ -z "$selected" ]] && exit 0

    # Extract and validate selection
    local session_id
    session_id=$(echo "$selected" | cut -f1)

    if ! is_valid_uuid "$session_id"; then
        log_error "Invalid session ID selected"
        exit 1
    fi

    local project
    project=$(jq -r --arg sid "$session_id" 'select(.sessionId == $sid) | .project' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

    if [[ -z "$project" ]]; then
        log_error "Session not found: $session_id"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo ""
    log_info "Resuming session: ${session_id:0:8}..."
    echo -e "${C_GREEN}Project:${C_RESET} $project"
    echo ""

    # Navigate to project and resume
    if [[ -d "$project" ]]; then
        cd "$project" || {
            log_warn "Failed to cd to project, using current directory"
        }
    else
        log_warn "Project directory does not exist: $project"
        echo "Using current directory instead"
    fi

    # Verify claude command exists
    if ! command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "claude command not found"
        exit 1
    fi

    exec claude --resume "$session_id"
}

main "$@"

input.new_string:
# Check if cache is valid and fresh
is_cache_valid() {
    if [[ -f "$CACHE_FILE" && -s "$CACHE_FILE" ]]; then
        local cache_age
        cache_age=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) ))
        if (( cache_age < CACHE_TTL )); then
            return 0
        fi
    fi
    return 1
}

# Stream process history - outputs lines as they're processed
stream_history() {
    local total_lines
    total_lines=$(wc -l < "$HISTORY_FILE" | tr -d ' ')
    local count=0

    jq -r '[.sessionId, .timestamp, .project, (.display | gsub("\n"; " ") | .[0:200])] | @tsv' "$HISTORY_FILE" 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS=$'\t' read -r sid ts proj msg; do
        ((count++))

        # Validate each record
        if ! is_valid_uuid "$sid"; then
            continue
        fi

        if [[ -z "$ts" || ! "$ts" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            continue
        fi

        local date_fmt
        date_fmt=$(date -r $((ts / 1000)) "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "???")

        local short_proj
        short_proj=$(echo "${proj:-unknown}" | rev | cut -d'/' -f1-2 | rev)

        printf '%s\t%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$sid" "$date_fmt" "$short_proj" "${msg:-<empty>}"

        # Update progress every 100 lines (to stderr, won't interfere with output)
        if (( count % 100 == 0 )); then
            local pct=$((count * 100 / total_lines))
            printf '\r\033[K⏳ Loading... %d/%d (%d%%)' "$count" "$total_lines" "$pct" >&2
        fi
    done

    printf '\r\033[K' >&2  # Clear progress line
}

# Generate cache with progress indicator
generate_cache() {
    # Check if cache is fresh
    if is_cache_valid; then
        return 0
    fi

    # Validate history file
    if ! check_file "$HISTORY_FILE" "History file"; then
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate JSON structure (sample first line)
    if ! head -1 "$HISTORY_FILE" | jq -e '.sessionId and .timestamp and .project' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        log_error "Invalid history file format"
        return 1
    fi

    # Count total lines for progress
    local total_lines
    total_lines=$(wc -l < "$HISTORY_FILE" | tr -d ' ')
    log_info "Processing $total_lines entries..."

    # Process with progress indicator
    local temp_cache="${CACHE_FILE}.tmp"

    if ! stream_history > "$temp_cache"; then
        log_error "Failed to process history file"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    # Validate output
    if [[ ! -s "$temp_cache" ]]; then
        log_error "No valid entries found in history"
        rm -f "$temp_cache"
        return 1
    fi

    mv "$temp_cache" "$CACHE_FILE"
    log_info "Cache ready!"
    return 0
}

        cache_age=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) ))
